case_title: APPAREL CLEAN INDRUSTIAL VS. THE RAMP RESTAURANT

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY APPAREL CLEAN INDRUSTIAL AS TO DEFENDANT THE RAMP RESTAURANT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT THE RAMP RESTAURANT
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $0.00 SERVED OCT-18-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE RAMP RESTAURANT
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDRUSTIAL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF IS PRESENT APPAREL CLEAN INDUSTRIAL REPRESENTED BY MK BIRCHEL, SERVICE MANAGER. DEFENDANT THE RAMP RESTAURANT IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY JOAN ROBINS. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APPAREL CLEAN INDRUSTIAL IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT THE RAMP RESTAURANT FOR THE REASON STATED IN THE ATTACHED MEMORANDUM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED FEB-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
